title: poa alpina subsp. involucrata
intro: Poa alpina subsp. involucrata, also known as Alpine Fescue, is a subspecies of the Poa alpina grass that is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Poa alpina subsp. involucrata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Poa alpina subsp. involucrata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
